title: ReActTask
description: Task payload for the ReAct agent. Validated at dispatch per RFC 0003 §D.

goal.description: The user's request, in natural language.

maxSteps.description: Hard cap on Reason+Act iterations. Host enforces; agent reads to plan ahead.

toolAllowlist.description: Per-dispatch tool allowlist. Extends (does not replace) the pack's default allowlist. Host MAY intersect with a host-level allowlist.

context.description: Free-form context object the host MAY pass through (e.g., user metadata, tenant tags). Agent SHOULD use it but is not required to.
